summary: Completed testing of Legal Pages (Privacy Policy, Terms of Service) and Footer Links (Iteration 7). All features working correctly. Privacy Policy page has 11 sections with PlumbPro branding. Terms of Service page has 15 sections with pricing table showing $4.99/$9.99/$19.99. Landing page footer has Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, and Contact links. Login page has legal links below the card. Auth flow still works with test credentials.
critical_code_review_comments: Google Play server-side verification is MOCKED - currently trusts purchase tokens from client without calling Google Play Developer API (carried over from previous iterations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features tested and working. Privacy Policy (/privacy) and Terms of Service (/terms) pages are public routes with PlumbPro branding, proper section counts, and working back buttons. Landing page footer has data-testid='footer-privacy-link' and data-testid='footer-terms-link'. Login page has legal links below the card.
passed_tests: Frontend: Landing page loads with promo banner (85 spots remaining)
Frontend: Landing page footer has Privacy Policy link (data-testid='footer-privacy-link')
Frontend: Landing page footer has Terms of Service link (data-testid='footer-terms-link')
Frontend: Landing page footer has Contact email link (mailto:support@plumbpro.com)
Frontend: Privacy Policy page loads at /privacy
Frontend: Privacy Policy page has PlumbPro branding in header
Frontend: Privacy Policy page has 11 sections
Frontend: Privacy Policy page has Back button (data-testid='privacy-back-btn')
Frontend: Privacy Policy Back button navigates correctly
Frontend: Terms of Service page loads at /terms
Frontend: Terms of Service page has PlumbPro branding in header
Frontend: Terms of Service page has 15 sections
Frontend: Terms of Service page has pricing table with $4.99/$9.99/$19.99
Frontend: Terms of Service page has Back button (data-testid='terms-back-btn')
Frontend: Login page has Privacy Policy link (/privacy)
Frontend: Login page has Terms of Service link (/terms)
Frontend: Auth flow works - login with testplumber@test.com / Test1234! redirects to dashboard

mocked_apis.google_play_server_verification: Server-side Google Play Developer API verification is stubbed. Currently trusts purchase tokens from client and records them without calling Google API. Full verification requires Google Cloud Service Account JSON.
